item.title: LEGO Friends Beach Buggy Fun Set with Toy Car Surf Board Mini-Dolls plus Dolphin and Dog Animal Figures Summer Playset for 4 Plus Years Old Kids Girls Boys 41725
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Beach Buggy Fun Set with Toy Car Surf Board Mini-Dolls plus Dolphin and Dog Animal Figures Summer Playset for 4 Plus Years Old Kids Girls Boys 41725 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Friends mini-dolls playset toy for kids, girls and boys aged 4+ lets little builders learn through play as they act beachfront adventures Includes LEGO Friends characters Liann and Zac mini-dolls with a surf board, a pet pug dog figure with a bone and water bowl plus a dolphin figure Introduce kids 4+ to the world of LEGO Friends with this Beach Buggy Fun mini-doll playset featuring a toy car, surf board and 2 animal figures LEGO 4+ sets for beginners contain Starter Brick ‘quick-start’ elements; digital instructions on the LEGO Builder app help build with confidence The colourful beach buggy toy car has a cool box on the back with a banana and ice cream while the wave element includes a buildable palm tree 🛒 Check the deal!
